'''鈭歜-th-v''' ('''kabathav''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:limetwig|limetwig]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-th-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:limetwig|limetwig]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歜-th-v
|-
! Lemma
| kabathav
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thibathav|thibathav]] || [[word:jibathav|jibathav]] || [[word:shibathav|shibathav]] || [[word:kibathav|kibathav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthubathav|thuthubathav]] || [[word:jujubathav|jujubathav]] || [[word:shushubathav|shushubathav]] || [[word:kukubathav|kukubathav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thubathav|thubathav]] || [[word:jubathav|jubathav]] || [[word:shubathav|shubathav]] || [[word:kubathav|kubathav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thubathav|thubathav]] || [[word:jubathav|jubathav]] || [[word:shubathav|shubathav]] || [[word:kubathav|kubathav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thebathav|thebathav]] || [[word:jebathav|jebathav]] || [[word:shebathav|shebathav]] || [[word:kebathav|kebathav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothobathav|thothobathav]] || [[word:jojobathav|jojobathav]] || [[word:shoshobathav|shoshobathav]] || [[word:kokobathav|kokobathav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thobathav|thobathav]] || [[word:jobathav|jobathav]] || [[word:shobathav|shobathav]] || [[word:kobathav|kobathav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thobathav|thobathav]] || [[word:jobathav|jobathav]] || [[word:shobathav|shobathav]] || [[word:kobathav|kobathav]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:bathav|bathav]] || [[word:bathav|bathav]] || [[word:bathav|bathav]] || [[word:bathav|bathav]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:bathav|bathav]] || [[word:bathav|bathav]] || [[word:bathav|bathav]] || [[word:bathav|bathav]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:bathav|bathav]] || [[word:bathav|bathav]] || [[word:bathav|bathav]] || [[word:bathav|bathav]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:bathav|bathav]] || [[word:bathav|bathav]] || [[word:bathav|bathav]] || [[word:bathav|bathav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙bathav|th忙bathav]] || [[word:j忙bathav|j忙bathav]] || [[word:sh忙bathav|sh忙bathav]] || [[word:k忙bathav|k忙bathav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathabathav|thathabathav]] || [[word:jajabathav|jajabathav]] || [[word:shashabathav|shashabathav]] || [[word:kakabathav|kakabathav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thabathav|thabathav]] || [[word:jabathav|jabathav]] || [[word:shabathav|shabathav]] || [[word:kabathav|kabathav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thabathav|thabathav]] || [[word:jabathav|jabathav]] || [[word:shabathav|shabathav]] || [[word:kabathav|kabathav]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shabathav|shabathav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshabathav|goshabathav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishabathav|gokishabathav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shabathavn眉|shabathavn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshabathavnkn眉|goshabathavnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishabathavn眉|gokishabathavn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shabathavsh毛|shabathavsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshabathavnksh毛|goshabathavnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishabathavsh毛|gokishabathavsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabathavro|shabathavro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabathavnkro|goshabathavnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabathavro|gokishabathavro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shabathavmu|shabathavmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabathavnkmu|goshabathavnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabathavmu|gokishabathavmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shabathavsher|shabathavsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshabathavnksher|goshabathavnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishabathavsher|gokishabathavsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shabathavng|shabathavng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshabathavnkng|goshabathavnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishabathavng|gokishabathavng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shabathavya|shabathavya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshabathavnkya|goshabathavnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishabathavya|gokishabathavya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shabathavyam|shabathavyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshabathavnkyam|goshabathavnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishabathavyam|gokishabathavyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabathavn眉sh毛|shabathavn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabathavnkn眉sh毛|goshabathavnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabathavn眉sh毛|gokishabathavn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabathavn眉ro|shabathavn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabathavnkn眉ro|goshabathavnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabathavn眉ro|gokishabathavn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabathavn眉mu|shabathavn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabathavnkn眉mu|goshabathavnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabathavn眉mu|gokishabathavn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabathavsh毛n眉|shabathavsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabathavnksh毛n眉|goshabathavnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabathavsh毛n眉|gokishabathavsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabathavsh毛ro|shabathavsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabathavnksh毛ro|goshabathavnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabathavsh毛ro|gokishabathavsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabathavsh毛mu|shabathavsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabathavnksh毛mu|goshabathavnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabathavsh毛mu|gokishabathavsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabathavron眉|shabathavron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabathavnkron眉|goshabathavnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabathavron眉|gokishabathavron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabathavrosh毛|shabathavrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabathavnkrosh毛|goshabathavnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabathavrosh毛|gokishabathavrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabathavromu|shabathavromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabathavnkromu|goshabathavnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabathavromu|gokishabathavromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabathavmun眉|shabathavmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabathavnkmun眉|goshabathavnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabathavmun眉|gokishabathavmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabathavmush毛|shabathavmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabathavnkmush毛|goshabathavnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabathavmush毛|gokishabathavmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabathavmuro|shabathavmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabathavnkmuro|goshabathavnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabathavmuro|gokishabathavmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
